name: add_feature
description: Add a UI component to a page. Types: input (text field + button), counter (incrementing tracker with progress bar), toggles (checklist of items), mood (emoji picker), textarea (multi-line text input), timer (countdown with controls), summary (auto-generated overview).

config.description: Type-specific config. counter: {max, unit}. input: {placeholder, button}. toggles: {items: []}. mood: {emojis: []}. textarea: {placeholder, button}. timer: {work, break, sessions}.
